title: Runner-level failures were detected outside logical test results.
message: Runner-level failures were detected outside logical test results.

observed.detail: Global errors or high-signal stderr messages suggest suite-load, import, or setup failures that are not represented in `manifest/tests.jsonl`.

action: Inspect global stderr and global errors before accepting the run, then rerun once the missing failures are understood.

legacy.subject: run

legacy.remediation_hint: Inspect global stderr and global errors before accepting the run, then rerun once the missing failures are understood.
